query: SELECT id, `key`, SUBSTRING(`value`, 1, 200) as preview FROM site_settings WHERE `key` LIKE 'cms_%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zuxFhcSmgfRMF3Y.5443ef0e52ed --database 7xKVuVPoe4TavcqcxPZkpC --execute SELECT id, `key`, SUBSTRING(`value`, 1, 200) as preview FROM site_settings WHERE `key` LIKE 'cms_%';
